caption: A man wearing glasses, a white button-down shirt, a red bow tie, and a grey, spiky wig sits in a studio setting. He wears large black over-ear headphones and speaks into a professional black microphone positioned in front of him. Behind him is a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and some clothing items hanging on racks. A white bag and a black bag are visible in the background. On-screen logos appear throughout the scene, including a red and white logo that says "PODCAST" and "ESTALID" and another red logo that reads "SS TALK JOY". The man remains in the same position across the sequence, his mouth moving as he speaks, while the background and equipment remain static. The scene captures a consistent shot of the man during a recording session.
